14

Welcome Back Social

Kick off the year with fellow pre-law students. Learn about upcoming events and how to get involved.

6:00 PM - 8:00 PM
UofGH Campus
OCT
19

Mooting Workshop

Learn the fundamentals of oral advocacy and written submissions from experienced mooters.

5:00 PM - 7:00 PM
UofGH Campus

Past Events

May 1, 2026

The GH Cup 2026

Our annual moot court competition brought together competitors and judges from across Ontario.

Empowering students to explore the legal profession through advocacy, mooting, and community.
